# fallback-quorum-failure manifest
# Covers: Parser tolerance (5-required-tags gate failure);
#         Disposition Enum fallback-to-synthesis with reason=missing_tag.
#
# D2's thesis debater file deliberately omits the <evidence> tag; the
# real orchestrator would classify D2 as fallback-to-synthesis and exclude
# it from the ballot. The smoke test's own debater structural check would
# fail hard on this; skip it here since the broken debater is
# intentional documentation of the failure mode.
skip_debater_validation=true

DECISION_1 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_2 expected_disposition=fallback-to-synthesis
DECISION_3 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
